name: Sitting 01
prompt: A dynamic shot of a character in a deep squatting pose within a doorway. One hand is placed high on the door frame for balance, while the other hand rests on the hip. One foot is flat on the ground, and the other is poised on its toes, creating a sense of tension and readiness.

name: Sitting 02
prompt: A frontal eye-level shot of a character sitting cross-legged on an ottoman. The character's back is gracefully arched, and the head is tilted back with closed eyes. The right hand rests lightly on the right ankle, while the left arm is raised with fingers running through the hair.
hint: Сидит по-турецки на пуфике, откинув голову назад, одна рука на лодыжке, другая в волосах.

name: Sitting 03
prompt: A frontal full-body shot of a character sitting in an armchair. The legs are crossed with the left leg over the right. The right arm rests on the armrest, with the hand supporting the side of the head. The left hand rests relaxed on the lap.
hint: Сидит в кресле, закинув левую ногу на правую, правая рука подпирает голову, левая лежит на коленях.

name: Sitting 04
prompt: A frontal full-body shot of a character sitting on a plush chair. One leg is bent with the knee raised to the chest, while the other leg rests comfortably on the floor. Both arms are wrapped around the raised knee, and the head is tilted slightly to the side. The camera is at eye level.
hint: Сидит в кресле, одно колено прижато к груди и обхвачено руками, вторая нога на полу.

name: Sitting 05
prompt: A frontal fullsize shot of a woman sitting on a stepped platform. The woman are spreading her legs wide, and both hands are placed on the top of her hips between the legs. The head is tilted back slightly, looking at the camera from a low perspective.

name: Sitting 06
prompt: A frontal medium full-body shot of a character kneeling on the floor against a red curtain. The character is sitting on their heels with both hands raised to the head, fingers resting near the temples. The camera is at eye level, capturing a direct gaze with a calm expression.
hint: Сидя на коленях (на пятках) лицом к камере, обе руки поднесены к голове (к вискам).

name: Sitting 07
prompt: A frontal medium fullsize shot of a character sitting on a sofa. The character is leaning sideways against the armrest with one arm. One leg is bent and pulled close to the chest, while the other leg is extended forward. One hand is raised, brushing through the hair.
hint: Сидит на диване, прислонившись к подлокотнику, одно колено подтянуто к груди, рука в волосах.

name: Sitting 08
prompt: A frontal medium shot of a character sitting comfortably in an upholstered armchair. The legs are crossed, and one hand is raised, fingers lightly touching the collarbone. The character's head is tilted slightly to the side with a serene expression. The camera is at eye level.
hint: Сидит в кресле, ноги скрещены, одна рука касается ключицы.

name: Sitting 09
prompt: A frontal medium shot of a character sitting on a chair with legs slightly apart. Both hands are raised and resting on the chest. The shoulders are pulled slightly forward, and the head is facing forward.
hint: Сидит на стуле, ноги слегка расставлены, обе руки подняты и лежат на груди.

name: Sitting 10
prompt: A frontal medium shot of a character sitting on a plush sofa. The character is leaning back against the sofa's backrest, with one arm extended along the top of the cushions. The legs are bent and tucked comfortably. The character gazes directly at the camera.
hint: Сидит на розовом диване, откинувшись назад, одна рука на спинке дивана.

name: Sitting 11
prompt: A frontal medium shot of a character sitting on a plush sofa. The character is leaning forward with the upper body towards the camera. Both legs are bent and tucked to the side. One hand rests on the sofa cushion for support. The character is looking directly at the camera.

name: Sitting 12

name: Sitting 75
prompt: The photograph, taken from a low angle, depicts a woman kneeling, leaning back slightly. Her right hand is tugging at her bra, her gaze is cast downward, her lips are slightly parted, and her eyes are half-closed. Her body is slightly arched; her torso is tilted forward from the hips upward, revealing sculpted abs beneath bare skin. Her left hand grips her thigh near the hip joint, creating tension. Her legs are spread wide. She appears relaxed yet purposeful—sensuality is conveyed through her posture, not through overt movement or facial expression. Her clothing reveals her figure—the fullness of her muscle tone, the curve of her spine, and the fine lines along her neck, collarbone, and waist remain visible in natural light, without filters or overlays. The shot emphasizes elongation through the perspective distortion inherent in low-angle shots, focusing attention directly on the intimate details of anatomy exposed by the open pose and purposeful positioning.

hint: Сидя на боку, одно колено поднято, стопы сведены вместе, асимметричная поза.

name: Sitting 103
prompt: A rear-view profile shot of a character sitting with their legs spread wide and looking back over their shoulder. The soles of the feet are visible, and the character's back is slightly arched, highlighting the overall silhouette from behind.
hint: Сидя спиной, ноги широко разведены, взгляд назад через плечо.

name: Sitting 104
prompt: A side-view shot of a character sitting and leaning backward. One arm is raised and tucked behind the head, exposing the armpit and stretching the torso. The other hand provides support on the ground.
hint: Сидя с наклоном назад, рука за головой, вид сбоку.

name: Sitting 105
prompt: A frontal 'cowboy shot' (mid-thigh up) of a character sitting on their side on the floor. They are supporting their weight with one arm while the other hand is placed near their face. The pose is relaxed and casual.
hint: Сидя на боку с опорой на руку, рука у лица, план 'ковбойский' (по бедра).

name: Sitting 106
prompt: A low-angle frontal shot of a character in a wide squat, leaning their weight backward. The legs are spread wide, and the Dutch angle creates a dynamic, foreshortened view of the limbs and torso.
hint: Глубокий присед, ноги широко разведены, наклон назад, вид снизу под углом.

name: Sitting 107
prompt: A shot of a character sitting with their knees pressed together and their feet spread apart (wariza-style). The camera is at a Dutch angle, focusing on the specific arrangement of the legs and the symmetry of the lower body.
hint: Сидя, колени вместе, ступни врозь, голландский угол.

name: Sitting 108
prompt: A side-view shot of a character in a dogeza position, kneeling with their torso pressed low to the floor. The camera is positioned at a Dutch angle, capturing the line from the arched back down to the visible soles of the feet.
hint: Поза догэдза, вид сбоку под углом, спина выгнута.

name: Sitting 109
prompt: An overhead view from behind of a character on all fours with their legs spread wide. The camera looks down at a steep angle, emphasizing the width of the pose and the curve of the back.
hint: Вид сверху сзади, на четвереньках, ноги широко разведены.

name: Sitting 110
prompt: A front-view shot of a character performing the jack-o' challenge. The character is on all fours with their chest low to the ground and legs spread wide, creating a high-arched back. The camera is positioned at a low angle facing forward.
hint: Поза 'Джек-о', вид спереди, грудь у пола, таз поднят.

name: Sitting 111
prompt: A low-angle shot from behind of a character on all fours, leaning forward. The legs are spread wide, and the character is looking back over their shoulder. The camera uses a Dutch angle to create dynamic foreshortening.
hint: На четвереньках, ноги широко, взгляд назад, вид снизу под углом.

name: Sitting 112
prompt: A shot from behind and slightly above of a character kneeling and leaning forward low to the ground. The character is looking back towards the camera. The soles of the feet are visible, and the Dutch angle emphasizes the spatial depth.
hint: На коленях, наклон вперед, взгляд назад, видны подошвы стоп.

name: Sitting 113
prompt: A low-angle side view of a character in a wariza kneeling position (sitting between their feet). The character is leaning back and arching their spine while looking back over their shoulder. The Dutch angle highlights the dramatic curves of the pose.
hint: Сидя между пяток (варидза), прогиб назад, взгляд через плечо, вид снизу сбоку.

name: Sitting 114
prompt: A similar shot of a character in a armchair. The character is leaning back more deeply, with one arm raised high above the head and the other resting on the armrest. The legs are extended forward, creating a long, relaxed line.
